description.en: Complete enterprise growth diagnosis framework. Through industry diagnosis → founder capability assessment → rapid scan → deep diagnosis → solution output, identify growth bottlenecks for SMEs and deliver actionable growth plans.
description.zh: 企业增长诊断框架。通过行业诊断→创始人能力评估→快速扫描→深度诊断→方案输出的完整流程，识别中小企业增长瓶颈，输出可落地的增长方案。

name.zh: 绩效沟通双向诊断系统

description.en: A dual-directional diagnosis system for Chinese workplace performance communication. Based on local high-context communication rules, it provides complete analysis including subtext decoding, bidirectional superior-subordinate diagnosis, actionable management suggestions, and turnover risk early-warning.
description.zh: 专为中国职场打造，基于本土高语境沟通规则，针对一对一绩效沟通文本，完成潜台词解码、上下级双向诊断、落地管理建议、流失风险预警全流程分析。
